## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (`make lint`).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works (`pytest`, `jest`).
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes (`make test-all`).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (if applicable).
- [ ] I have checked that the static analysis and security scanners pass (`ruff`, `mypy`, `bandit`).

## Security Checklist
- [ ] No secrets/credentials committed
- [ ] No new SQL injection vectors
- [ ] Tenant isolation maintained
- [ ] Rate limiting applied to new endpoints
